title: alyssum epirotum
intro: Alyssum epirotum, also known as sweet alyssum or wild candytuft, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Alyssum epirotum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
